CustomField.description: Consolidates product interest from LST Primary 1-3 for reports
CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "BTX - BIOTHERAPEUTICS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "BTX - BIOTHERAPEUTICS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "BTX - BIOTHERAPEUTICS"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "BTX"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "BTX")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-BTX
